summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Edit Invoice feature, Mixed Currency support, and Duplicate Invoice functionality. All backend API tests passed (11/11). Fixed a critical frontend bug (missing Copy icon import). All features working correctly after fix.

ui_bugs.issue: Missing Copy icon import causing runtime error on Duplicate Invoice feature

issues: Rate column shows ₹ symbol but doesn't display original currency (INR/USD) - may be intentional for print layout

critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: InvoiceForm.jsx Line 8 was missing 'Copy' import from lucide-react, causing runtime error when duplicating invoices
seed_data_creation: Created test invoices with mixed currencies for testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Edit Invoice, Mixed Currency, and Duplicate Invoice features are all working. Backend PUT /api/invoices/{id} endpoint tested and working. Fixed missing Copy import in InvoiceForm.jsx. PDF extraction endpoint /api/extract-shipment-details is MOCKED and returns sample data.

tested_flows: Navigate from dashboard to invoice view
Click Edit button to load edit form
Verify form pre-populated with existing data
Modify expense rate and shipment details
Set first expense to INR (rate 1000, exchange 1)
Set second expense to USD (rate 100, exchange 83.50)
Submit and verify total with GST: ₹11,033
